package.name: hyumm_nrt
package.description: ROS2 (ament) non-realtime bridge for the HYU-MM mobile manipulator. The hyumm_vive_xddp_node localizes from the libsurvive tracker topics (in-process ViveLocalizer), broadcasts TF, and bridges odom/cmd_vel/robot-state to the Xenomai RT controller over self-healing XDDP /dev/rtpN links (byte-identical binary packet:: schema, wire-compatible with the unchanged RT side).
